name: Intune Device Migration
description: Intune Device Migration off-boards devices from one tenant and automatically joins them to a destination tenant, preserving user data during the transition. Built with PowerShell, Microsoft Graph, and Windows provisioning packages, it enables near-zero downtime cross-tenant migrations, with detailed logging, registry updates, and post-install validation to ensure provisioning packages are applied correctly.
author: Steve Weiner

securityCheck.aiSummary: The code implements legitimate Intune/Entra migration tasks with Graph API use and BitLocker handling. The main security concerns relate to secret management (clientSecret in config.json) and the ability to decrypt BitLocker; these require strong access controls, secret rotation, and auditing. No obfuscated or remote code execution patterns detected. Use of Graph API beta endpoints is acceptable for migrations but monitor for changes.
